posts.author: vekatip971 (vekatip)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone…

I am fairly new to Monday. com and I am trying to set up an automation that will automatically assign tasks to specific team members based on their priority. For example, I want tasks marked as high priority to be automatically assigned to a particular team member, while tasks marked as low priority go to someone else.

I have explored the automation recipes but I am not sure if I am setting it up correctly, or if there’s a better way to achieve this.

I also check this: https://community.monday.com/t/automating-task-assignments-based-on-custom-statuses-emmanuel-katto-ugandjiratraining But I have not found any solution. Could anyone guide me about this? Has anyone done something similar? If so, could you walk me through the steps or point me in the right direction? Any insights into automating task assignment based on specific fields would be really helpful!

Thanks in advance!

Respected community member!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
